name: keyman-shift-planner
description: Native-ready mobile app for Keyman shift rotations, calendar, and checklist.

scripts.native:sync: npm run build && LANG=en_US.UTF-8 LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 PATH="$HOME/.gem/ruby/2.6.0/bin:$PATH" npx cap sync
scripts.native:ios: npm run build && LANG=en_US.UTF-8 LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 PATH="$HOME/.gem/ruby/2.6.0/bin:$PATH" npx cap add ios
